nodes.name: White-spotted mannikin
nodes.summary: White-spotted mannikin（Mayrimunia leucosticta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-spotted mannikin。

nodes.name: Mayrimunia
nodes.summary: Mayrimunia（Mayrimunia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如White-spotted mannikin、纹头文鸟。

nodes.name: White-spotted mannikin
nodes.summary: The white-spotted mannikin (Mayrimunia leucosticta) is a small passerine bird in the family Estrildidae. It is endemic to southern New Guinea. This species has sometimes been considered as a subspecies of the streak-headed mannikin. The species is monotypic. References
